basics.headline: Full-Stack Developer
basics.summary: I'm a Full-Stack Developer based in Ludwigshafen am Rhein, Germany, with a background in web development, software engineering, and game design. I enjoy building end-to-end solutions and working seamlessly across various programming languages and web frameworks. Beyond just writing code, I value strong project management to ensure ideas actually make it to production efficiently and on time. When I’m not at my keyboard, I’m usually tinkering with electronics, keeping up with new tech, or tending to my garden. I also enjoy winding down with gaming, anime, and web novels. I speak fluent German and English, and I always aim to bring a practical, creative approach to the software I build.

highlights: Development of an Download Manager as a Prototype in PHP and than in Svelte
Development of an Web Application for the Management of a Cleaning Company
Development of an Web Application for the Management of an QR Code based Redirection System
Development of Apps, Plugins, Wrappers and Apis for Deta.space
Development of an Web Application which enables playing retro games in the Browser based on WASM Compiled Emulators.
Development of an Android Application to read Web & Light Novels from different Providers in an unified UI.
Development of an API & Crawler to build an index of Web & Light Novels from different Providers.
Some Prototype ML/AI Applications which can generate Content, Images, Translate etc. which is used in different Projects.
Development of an Network Bridge between Web/Cloud to VisualBasic Application
Development of an Application/API to automate Facebook Events
Development of an APP for the Android and iOS Platform for Room Booking
Planned and ReDesigned a Cloud/Web based Management System
Planned, Developed and Managed a booking, website and web2print system for cinemas (pmkino) using PhalconPHP, Wordpress, MongoDB, Python, NodeJS and ReactJS
Developed a Web2Print solution using PhalconPHP, Wordpress, MongoDB, Python, NodeJS and ReactJS
Developed a Wordpress Plugin and Theme environment for Messe Bremen Events, which was used in 10+ Websites.

education.degree: journeyman's certificate, specialized in Design and Technology
journeyman's certificate, early dropout due to allergic reactions.

projects.name: Client Projects (NDA)
projects.description: Ongoing full-stack development, API design, cloud infrastructure, and software consulting for various clients. Details protected by non-disclosure agreements.

projects.name: LLM Applications & AI Integration
projects.description: Development of applications and workflows leveraging large language models including local LLM deployment (ollama, llama.cpp), Open WebUI, RAG pipelines, prompt engineering, and API wrappers for multiple AI providers.

projects.name: AI Image Generation Pipeline
projects.description: Design and implementation of AI image generation pipelines using Stable Diffusion (ComfyUI, Automatic1111), custom LoRA training, batch generation and upscaling automation, and integration into existing workflows.

projects.name: Deta-PHP
projects.description: PHP SDK for interacting with the Deta API. Provides a Deta client class for accessing Deta Base (NoSQL database) and Deta Drive (file storage).

projects.name: Deta-PHP-Engine
projects.description:
PHP Runtime / Engine for Deta.Space. Based on PHP Version 8.1.8 using the Internal Webserver. Supports a wide range of PHP extensions including bcmath, curl, dom, gd, mbstring, mongodb, mysqlnd, pdo_mysql, pdo_sqlite, redis, simplexml, soap, sqlite3, swoole, tokenizer, xml, zip, and more.

Features:
- PHP 8.1.8
- Internal Webserver
- Support for multiple PHP Micros by duplicating the php folder and spacefile config
- Custom php.ini support via --with-config-file

projects.name: Deta-PHP-Sandbox
projects.description:
Online Sandbox / Playground / Console to quickly test PHP code, deployed on Deta Space. Provides an interactive environment where users can paste PHP code, hit run, and see results in real-time without needing a local development setup.

Features syntax highlighting, code completion, and error handling. Accessible from anywhere, at any time, without additional software. Available at: https://deta.space/discovery/@tuefekci/phpsandbox

projects.name: deta-queue
projects.description: Queue implementation for use with Deta Base, written in TypeScript. Provides a simple FIFO queue backed by Deta's NoSQL database with configurable TTL and queue name. Published as npm package `deta-queue`.

projects.name: deta-s3-server
projects.description:
S3 Server for Deta.Space (Deta Drive) written in NodeJS based on jamhall/s3rver. A simple S3-compatible server that uses Deta Drive as a backend. Not a full S3 implementation — provides basic S3 API compatibility for storing and retrieving files via Deta Drive.

Available on Deta Space Discovery: https://deta.space/discovery/@tuefekci/s3server

projects.name: flatfilecache
projects.description: Node.js flat file cache library written in TypeScript. Provides a simple file-based caching mechanism using the local filesystem, suitable for scenarios where a full database or Redis cache is not needed.

projects.name: novelsource-proxy
projects.description: Proxy server for novel sources, complementing novelsourcePHP. Provides a proxy layer for web novel scraping operations, handling routing and requests between the scraping client and target novel sites.

projects.name: novelsourcePHP
projects.description:
A collection of webnovel/novel sources offering varying amounts of scraping capability. Primarily built for meta data aggregation (tags and genres for recommendation) rather than content scraping.

Available as a Composer package: `tuefekci/novelsource`. Supports novel source adapters with search and last-checked tracking. Inspired by mensch272/novelsave_sources (Python) but built for PHP use cases.

projects.name: blkhole
projects.description:
Blkhole serves as a download management tool designed for AllDebrid cloud downloads, facilitating the seamless automation of downloads directly to your local network.

Key features:
- User-friendly web interface for management of alldebrid.com downloads, cloud Torrent, Magnet, and DDL links
- Automated category-based downloading of completed cloud tasks to the local file system
- Download enhancements and optimizations
- Supports Magnet links, DDL links, Torrents, Chunked Downloads
- Bandwidth and connection limitation
- Automatic cleanup of finished and failed downloads
- Tested with Radarr and Sonarr

projects.name: docker-radarr-xu4
projects.description: Docker configuration to run Radarr on an ODROID-XU4 single-board computer. Provides a containerized setup for the Radarr movie management tool optimized for ARM-based hardware.

projects.name: docker-sonarr-xu4
projects.description: Docker configuration to run Sonarr on an ODROID-XU4 single-board computer. Includes a workaround to force the mono process onto one set of cores (big cores 4,5,6,7 and small cores 0,1,2,3) to resolve performance issues on the big.LITTLE ARM architecture.

projects.name: helpers
projects.description:
Personal PHP helper library following PSR-4 autoloading and PSR-2 coding standards. Includes unit testing with PHPUnit 6, comprehensive guide and tutorial, and easy integration with any framework or plain PHP.

Requirements: PHP >= 7.0, Composer. Uses a standard project structure with build/, src/, tests/ directories, Travis CI configuration, and code sniffing tools (PHPCS, PHPCBF).

projects.name: overcli
projects.description:
OverCLI is a PHP CLI / TUI Helper / Framework Library with a Render Loop, similar to how Game Engines handle application rendering. A collection of useful functions and classes for building CLI and TUI applications.

Features:
- Render Loop for continuous rendering with events
- Exception renderer for static error display
- Demo applications including a PIN IDENTIFICATION PROGRAM inspired by T2 Movie Prop
- Fully dependent on the Runtime, framerate is stable with fine memory usage

Requirements: PHP 7.2+ and Composer.

projects.name: php-benchmark
projects.description:
Benchmarking PHP7, PHP8, and PHP7-parallel performance on an i7-4790k with 16GB DDR3. Tests include math operations, string manipulation, loops, and if/else conditions with 1,000,000 iterations across 16 workers.

Results (2021-10-04):
- PHP 7.4.24: Total 79.612s (serial)
- PHP 7.4.24-parallel: Total 9.361s (16 workers)
- PHP 8.0.11: Total 69.053s (serial)

Conclusion: PHP8 performs better than PHP7 especially in string manipulation, while parallel processing on PHP7 delivers the fastest results for suitable workloads.

projects.name: Android Web / Light Novel Reader
projects.description: An Android app for reading web and light novels. It aggregates content from various sources and offers a customized reader mode with bookmarks, offline storage, and customizable display options.

projects.name: Download Manager (PHP → Svelte)
projects.description: A cloud-based download manager migrated from a PHP backend to a modern Svelte/SvelteKit architecture. It manages and automates downloads from various cloud services with a reactive UI and WebSocket status updates.

projects.name: QR Code Redirect System
projects.description: A powerful QR code redirect system built with the Slim Framework. It generates QR codes that dynamically redirect based on device type, location, or other parameters for marketing campaigns and dynamic print media links.

projects.name: ReactNative App und API (WebNovels)
projects.description: A Laravel-based API that fetches data from web novel sites for use with a ReactNative reader app. The API and crawler are complete while the app remains in active development.

projects.name: Retro Game Browser Emulator (WASM)
projects.description: A platform-independent retro console emulator running in the browser with core logic ported to WebAssembly for native performance. Supports multiple classic consoles with save states and controller mapping.

projects.name: ReactNative CRM Task/Todo App
projects.description: A ReactNative app for CRM software that forwards system-generated tasks to employees and reports issues back to the system.

projects.name: Reinigungsfirma CRM
projects.description: A PHP/Laravel CRM for managing tasks, inventory, personnel, issues/tickets, and chats, integrated into the client's existing app via WebView.

projects.name: phpkg
projects.description:
Package your PHP project into an executable for Linux, Mac and Windows. Provides source code protection by compiling PHP projects into standalone executables. Includes benchmark comparisons between the packaged (phpkg) version and native PHP 8.1.3 on an i5-8259U CPU.

Benchmark results showed minimal performance difference between phpkg and native PHP execution (64.334s vs 67.316s total for math, string, loop, and if/else tests), indicating the packaging adds negligible overhead.

projects.name: Facebook Events Automation API
projects.description: An automation API for Facebook Events. The system automatically synchronizes Facebook events with a local database and enables further processing of event data in other systems — ideal for event calendars and ticketing platforms.

projects.name: Room Booking App (Android/iOS)
projects.description: A mobile room booking app for Android and iOS. The system includes a calendar with real-time availability display, push notifications for booking changes, and a REST API for integration into existing booking systems.

projects.name: VB2Web Bridge und API
projects.description: A bridge service built with Node.js, C++, and WebSockets enabling a legacy VB application to exchange data via REST with a cloud infrastructure.

projects.name: Docker-PHP7-Phalcon
projects.description: Docker + PHP7 + Phalcon development container. Provides a complete development environment combining PHP 7 with the Phalcon PHP framework (compiled as a C-extension), designed for rapid web application development.

projects.name: Docker-PHP7-Container
projects.description: Docker development container for PHP7, designed for WordPress development. Provides a ready-to-use PHP7 environment with necessary extensions for running and testing WordPress sites locally.

projects.name: Website & Shop verias24.de
projects.description: Complex website and shop for verias24 insurance products, encompassing database modeling, layouts, insurance calculations, and ERP system integration.

projects.name: SaveFM
projects.description: SaveFM was a platform for recording and managing internet radio streams. The project consisted of several components: a CakePHP-based API and web application with dashboard, recording management, server control (via DigitalOcean API), user management and friends list; an Ember.js single-page application as admin frontend with Bootstrap UI; and a public website. The platform enabled scheduled recording of radio stations, management of recordings, and delivery via a web interface.

The site presented women's and men's collections, stage gowns, fashion trends, and events. Implemented with the Limonade PHP micro-framework, custom route structure, and individually designed templates with CSS animations.

Product data was hierarchically organized by categories and models and prepared for export to various output formats.

Ambari is a specialist for wine, spirits, wine accessories, delicacies, and lifestyle.

As part of the relaunch, image advertising carried out various optimizations of the webshop. More user-friendly design and search engine optimizations were the main focus. The new offers and gifts in the webshop have been very well received by customers.

image advertising supported MVD with shop systems and customer service.
